title: hieracium pratense subsp. sudetorum
intro: Hieracium pratense subsp. sudetorum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly known as a type of hawk's beard or yellow hawk's beard. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pratense subsp. sudetorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin issues.
